title: cyanotis lanata
intro: Cyanotis lanata, also known as the white hair grass, is a plant species belonging to the family Commelinaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyanotis lanata include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antidote for certain poisons. Herbal preparations of Cyanotis lanata include teas, infusions, and powdered forms, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its benefits.
